summary: Frontend testing for 6 UI requests: nav simplification, hero transparent logo, €500/1-2 weeks badges, pill-shaped buttons, Google Reviews removal. All 12 requirements verified and PASSED. Also confirmed iteration_13 CalculatorPage CTA button fix (now rounded-full + bg-gray-500).
passed_tests: 1. Header has only DIENSTEN dropdown, OVER, CONTACT and START PROJECT - NO standalone Pakketten or Calculator nav items - PASS
2. DIENSTEN dropdown contains: Pakketten & Prijzen, Prijscalculator, Webdesign, Onderhoud & Hosting, Kappers, Nagelstylisten, Coaches, Restaurants, Loodgieters, Alle Branches - PASS
3. Logo transparent visible right of hero section (absolute right, opacity 0.06, next to ONLINE text) - PASS
4. €500 VANAF and 1-2 WEKEN badges visible as pills directly under subtitle text - PASS
5. START PROJECT hero button is pill-shaped (rounded-full) - PASS
6. BEKIJK WERK hero button is pill-shaped (rounded-full) - PASS
7. Google Reviews NOT visible in calculator add-ons list (hidden:true + filter applied at line 558) - PASS
8. Google Reviews NOT visible in packages page features or losse extras section - PASS
10. Packages page loads correctly without Google Reviews - PASS
13. (BONUS) Calculator summary CTA 'Vraag offerte aan' is now rounded-full + bg-gray-500 (was bg-gray-900 from iteration_13) - FIXED + PASS
14. (BONUS) TestimonialsSection is now rendered in LandingPage between PricingSection and FAQSection - FIXED + PASS
15. START PROJECT nav button is pill-shaped (rounded-full) - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: All 6 UI requests verified as correctly implemented.
Note: The Diensten dropdown label for the calculator link is '→ Prijscalculator' (not just 'Calculator') - this is intentional and correct Dutch naming.
TestimonialsSection (iteration_13 issue) is now rendered in LandingPage - confirmed fixed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 14: All 6 UI requests fully verified. Nav simplified (Diensten dropdown only, no standalone Pakketten/Calculator). Hero has transparent logo right side (opacity 0.06). €500 VANAF + 1-2 WEKEN badge pills below subtitle. Both hero CTA buttons are pill-shaped. Google Reviews removed from Calculator add-ons and Packages page. All pages load correctly. Iteration_13 remaining issue (Calculator sidebar CTA bg-gray-900) also confirmed fixed. No remaining issues.
